title: Scheduled Restore Test Outcomes vs Policy Frequency

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

spl:
index=backup sourcetype=cohesity:restore_test earliest=-365d
| stats latest(status) as last_status, latest(_time) as last_run by policy_name
| eval days_since=(now()-last_run)/86400
| where days_since>90 OR last_status!="success"
value: Tracks restore test jobs for recovery plan execution evidence beyond daily backup success.
implementation: (1) Align to RTO tiers; (2) document failures; (3) executive attestation.
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
